uiSurface: Page or detail section: overview
compatibility: RabbitMQ Management API fields are parsed conservatively so older and newer broker responses can omit optional diagnostics.

legacyBehavior: Legacy RabbitMQ Management exposes #/ from ../rabbitmq-server/deps/rabbitmq_management/priv/www/js/dispatcher.js for this operation.
